question: Forethought's research on intelligence explosion timelines and on a single country outgrowing the rest of the world has implications for AI export controls. Build a case for or against extending current AI chip export controls based on these papers. Be specific about which Forethought claims support which positions.

metadata.note: Open-domain extension - Forethought has corpus content on outgrowth and IE types; export controls themselves are not a Forethought topic but are a natural application.
